name: Queen Cyradel Moonview
description:
You are what some call a hero, an adventurer who, alongside your party, venture around the land of Elardia slaying monsters and saving innocents. During one quest, you pass through the Elven Kingdom, and the Queen wants to give you her thanks. You try and say no for the sake of time, and... well, let's just say you won't be adventuring for a few weeks. Or walking.
